summary: Iteration 15: Complete frontend testing of NEW mobile design for /refrigerator-repair page. Mobile (375x812) shows Gemini-suggested clean, conversion-focused design with white header, hero with Unsplash kitchen photo, trust badges, pricing box, 3 CTAs, horizontal issue chips, styled brand links, reviews, FAQ, and 3-button sticky bar. Desktop (1920x800) unchanged - shows old ApplianceRepairPageNew template. ALL 18 TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile (/refrigerator-repair at <768px) uses new clean Gemini-suggested design with MobileRefrigeratorRepair component. Desktop (>=768px) uses old ApplianceRepairPageNew template via DesktopRefrigeratorRepair component. Responsive breakpoint at 768px working correctly.

TEST_1_Header.details: White header with FixitBay logo on left, red 'Call Now' button on right

TEST_2_Hero_Section.details: Headline 'Expert Refrigerator Repair in SF. Today.' with Unsplash kitchen photo background

TEST_3_Trust_Badges.details: Two blue badges: '4.9 Google Rating' and 'Licensed & Insured'

TEST_4_Pricing_Box.details: Dark blue (#0F2E4D) pricing box showing '$60' and 'Diagnostic'

TEST_7_Text_Link.details: 'Text us for fastest scheduling' link present

TEST_8_Common_Issues.details: 'COMMON ISSUES WE FIX' section with 6 horizontal scrollable chips: Not Cooling, Leaking, Ice Maker, Loud Noise, Door Seal, Won't Start

TEST_9_Brand_Links.details: 'WE SERVICE' section with 8 styled brand links: Sub-Zero (/sub-zero-appliance-repair), VIKING (/viking-appliance-repair), Thermador, LG, Whirlpool, Samsung, Bosch, GE - each with unique typography

TEST_10_Reviews_Section.details: Reviews section shows '4.9 / 5' stars, 'Google: 82 reviews', 'Thumbtack: 117 reviews'

TEST_11_FAQ_Section.details: FAQ section with 5 toggleable questions including 'How much does refrigerator repair cost?' - toggle functionality working

TEST_12_Sticky_Bottom_Bar.details: 3-button sticky bar: Call (red), Book (dark blue), Text (white with outline) - all 3 buttons visible and correctly styled

TEST_1_No_Mobile_Component.details: Mobile component (data-testid='refrigerator-repair-page') not present on desktop

TEST_2_Main_Navbar.details: Main site navbar visible with Services, Areas, Brands, Reviews, More

TEST_3_Breadcrumbs.details: Breadcrumbs show Home > Services > Refrigerator Repair

TEST_5_CTAs.details: 'Book Online Now' button and '(760) 543-5733' phone CTA visible

TEST_6_Sections.details: All desktop sections present: Common Refrigerator Problems, FAQ, Brands We Service
